Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO ENVIRONMENTAL CONSERVATION

Title: Relates to the calculation of statewide greenhouse gas emission limits; repealer
Summary: Amends the definition of "carbon dioxide equivalent" to provide that such term be calculated based on a 100-year time frame after emission; provides for rules and regulations to amend the statewide greenhouse gas emissions limit; repeals provisions of law relating to statewide greenhouse gas emissions reductions.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the environmental conservation law, in relation to the calculation of statewide greenhouse gas emission limits; and to repeal section 75-0109 of the environmental conservation law relating thereto
